label: CS-001 deterministic recall miss is partly a prompt-source artifact: the parser uses the per-feature prompt without motion.dev while the root prompt contains motion.dev.
SD-001 is a real intent-signal gap: add/gated/IntersectionObserver/smooth-scroll do not trigger IMPLEMENTATION, so observer/webflow implementation gold is missed.
smart_routing has a Webflow contract contradiction: prose mandates an implementation trio for any Webflow surface, while route-time logic loads only matched-intent slices.
Live D3 can undercount actual exploration cost because live scoring uses stated resources/assets while observed reads include broad references/assets globs.
